blacklevel / bilevel cutoff: threshold choice preserves silhouette
reason: vectorizer traces in colormode='color' (multi-layer), not a bilevel/blacklevel cutoff; no grey-cutoff parameter is exposed to isolate.

concept: mkbitmap highpass filter: evening out background gradients
reason: vectorizer exposes no highpass background-flatten stage; _presmoothed_source only does median smoothing, not gradient removal. No pipeline hook to isolate.
